subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Night and day at the threshold of the All-Sufficient do I make supplication and earnest entreaty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء شب و روز بدرگاه حضرت بی نیاز عجز و زاری کنم و تضرع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for peace and unity, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @non-participation in politics, @unity; oneness of humanity, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
